title: FOI2025-00209: ChatGPT history of ministers in DSIT
body: "   Reference number FOI2025-00209   Date of request 19 March 2025   Date of response 10 April 2025   Outcome Information accessible by other means     The Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (the department) received the following request for information which we responded to under the Freedom of Information Act 2000 (FOIA):    Please provide any chat GPT prompts and responses made in an official capacity by the ministers in your department since 5 July 2024. If this is going over cost limits, please just provide the data for the Secretary of State.    "
